title: Deliver target scrape (with attachments) into repo cache
directive: Scrape target 6a316aa8-5dc8-83ea-9014-b8ea38dabc31 WITH attachments into repo-local gitignored cache/ (make cache/ the DEFAULT data-dir), confirm math fidelity, deliver transcript FIRST then attachments. Capture/scrape PROVEN in M5.

ground_truth.acceptance_command: uv run pytest (mock suite; real_site deselected)
ground_truth.history_export_already_browserless: Session.history -> store.load_transcript (session.py:344-345); no attach/preflight. Cache-read-without-browser already holds; T1 adds falsifiable tests + the cache default.
ground_truth.with_attachments_is_noop: capture.py:299 capture_conversation does `del with_attachments`; T4 wires the real byte download. All 4 AttachmentRef shapes ALREADY parsed (capture.py:429-487).
ground_truth.byte_download_primitive: channels/cdp.py fetch_in_page (stream_to=) streams bytes to disk, allowlist-checked; channels/mock.py fetch_in_page for offline tests.
ground_truth.proven_real_harness: scripts/m5_capture_measure.py --conversation <id/url> --data-dir <cache> --out <md>; constructs Session(channel=cdp), session.scrape(), session.detach(); prints fidelity/vocab/memory JSON; NEVER prints content.
ground_truth.test_isolation_flag: tests/test_store_layout.py:32-35 asserts the OLD ~/.local/state home default; T1 MUST update it for the cache default; ensure no test writes into repo cache/.
ground_truth.allowlist_hosts: chatgpt.com, openai.com, oaiusercontent.com, oaistatic.com (+ subdomains) — attachment download_url host likely oaiusercontent.com (allowlisted).

constraints_safety: SHARED browser w/ another active agent: own-tab-only, READ-ONLY (scrape+download are reads), ZERO sends/new-turns/model-tool selection, never quit browser (detach only), preflight curl first, login/Cloudflare->STOP HUMAN-ACTION-NEEDED, read ONLY target 6a316aa8, NEVER persist/log authorization/oai-*/cookie values, cache content stays LOCAL (gitignored) never committed. Branch rewrite-v2 only; never move/commit stable; never uv tool install/upgrade/reinstall (uv run/uv sync only); never git push; stage ONLY code/config (NEVER cache/ content, issues/cdp-send-repro/controller.mjs [pre-existing dirty], team/state/live-state.json, human/). Workers=pi via pi-watch.sh; NEVER the Claude Agent tool; this manager=Opus.

queue.title: cache/ default data-dir + cache semantics + tests
queue.verified: manager re-ran uv run pytest=207 passed; diff inspected; falsifiable tests confirmed; no repo cache pollution; stable unmoved 779eb40

queue.title: scrape target into cache + fidelity; DELIVER transcript
queue.verified: TRANSCRIPT DELIVERED to cache/conversations/6a316aa8.../ (transcript.jsonl 5.4MB, raw-mapping.json 21.4MB, markdown 2.1MB). FIDELITY CONFIRMED via manager content-free re-derivation (zero \frac/ corruption, zero literal U+2260, widehat/ne/frac present). Worker's PARTIAL was a false-alarm from my over-strict count(\frac)==count(\frac{) criterion. cache-as-cache proven (history reads no-browser). Leak bright-line clean. 497 turns/6467 nodes (grew since M5).
queue.lesson: history/scrape/export --out mirror to stdout AND file (gotcha-4); agent runs MUST redirect stdout to /dev/null to keep content out of logs.

queue.title: attachment byte-route discovery
queue.verified: Route CONFIRMED live read-only: AttachmentRef->file id->GET /backend-api/files/<id>/download (web-app headers)->follow download_url (host chatgpt.com, cookie-bound)->bytes. GOTCHA: 200 alone != success (run_ids return 200 error-JSON; require download_url). Target counts: user_upload 10, file_reference 270(9 distinct), generated_asset 169(47 distinct, sediment:// w/ embedded file token), code_execution_output 216 UNSUPPORTED. Leak-scan clean (no ids/urls/headers in committed scripts/report).

queue.title: implement attachment download + run real download
queue.verified: manager re-ran uv run pytest=212; download wiring inspected (dedup by file_id, requires download_url, fail-closed, headers in-memory only, idempotent, size-verified); leak scan clean. Real shipment: 10 distinct files (55MB) in gitignored cache; last-writer-wins transcript shows downloaded=359 refs->10 paths (0 missing bytes), unsupported=125 (code_execution), 0 pending/error. ~66 estimate was overcount: distinct backend tokens overlap to 10 physical files (honestly flagged).

queue.title: independent verify panel (3 lenses) incl. leak/no-send audit
queue.verified: ALL 3 LENSES PASS, ground-truth-derived. L1 leak/no-send/own-tab clean. L2 212 passed + falsifiability line-cited. L3 cache-default + cache-as-cache(browser_call_count=0) + FIDELITY CONFIRMED(frac/=0,U+2260=0) + attachment shipment(10 distinct paths,0 missing,code_exec unsupported).

commit_policy: Workers edit + report; MANAGER independently re-derives (uv run pytest + diff inspect) then commits explicit code/config paths (no -A, no push, no Co-Authored-By). Reports under team/evidence/ committed after leak check. cache/ content NEVER committed. M6-manager-state.json kept uncommitted.
notes: Real-legs serialized (shared browser + transcript-first). T1 offline runs alone. Deliver transcript even if attachments partially fail.
